name: Emergency LED Exit Sign – Red/Green – With Battery Backup
description: This Red/Green LED Exit Sign is a dependable emergency lighting solution engineered to meet stringent safety and compliance standards in commercial and industrial environments. With integrated battery backup and versatile configuration options, it ensures high visibility and reliable performance when it matters most.
short_desc: Key Features: Battery Backup: Built-in emergency battery provides 90+ minutes of illumination after a full 24-hour charge. Dual-Color Options: Includes both red and green inserts with an internal switch to easily select your preferred letter color. Versatile Configuration: Includes an extra faceplate for optional double-sided use and removable directional arrows for tailored exit guidance. Durable Construction: Made from flame-retardant thermoplastic for enhanced safety and longevity. Easy Maintenance: Equipped with a charge indicator and test button to ensure functionality and compliance. Code Compliant: UL 924 Listed for emergency lighting and exit sign requirements. Ideal Applications: Commercial Buildings: Retail stores, office complexes, and business centers Industrial Facilities: Warehouses, manufacturing plants, and utility buildings Institutional Spaces: Schools, healthcare facilities, and government properties
